title: audit — Artisan commands
description: 7 ops + support commands. Every command is READ-heavy or ops-privileged; there is NO write command for creating audits (capture is exclusively via the vendor Auditable trait). The purge + backfill + extend-retention commands are the only mutation paths and each requires explicit privileges + audit-trail metadata.

commands.purpose: Paginated list of audit rows. Same filters as GET /api/v1/audits. --auditable accepts either just the class name ('Membership') or the fully-qualified form ('Academorix\\Finance\\Models\\Membership'). Useful for CLI-based investigation and platform-support tooling.
commands.notes: Redacts old_values + new_values by default; --reveal-diff flag requires super_admin AND writes an audit row for the reveal action (chain of custody).

commands.purpose: Dump a single audit row + its subject (auditable) + actor (user) context. Includes old_values + new_values blob (redacted by default; --reveal-diff writes a chain-of-custody row).
commands.notes: audit_id is the vendor's bigint primary key. When the aud_ ULID conversion lands in Wave 7+, this signature switches to `{audit_ulid}`.

commands.purpose: Rollup — audit row counts per tenant over the window. Useful for identifying tenants with unusually high mutation activity (potential exfiltration or data-import event).

One-shot migration helper. Reads audit rows where tenant_id IS NULL, extracts the value from new_values.tenant_id (fallback: old_values.tenant_id), populates the column. Delegates to BackfillAuditTenantIdFromJsonbJob for batching. Idempotent — re-runs skip already-populated rows.
commands.notes: Rate-limited to 1 concurrent invocation per environment (uses a distributed lock). --dry-run flag prints the count of null-tenant-id rows without mutating. --all flag processes every tenant; --tenant=<slug> processes a single tenant.

commands.purpose: Manual invocation of PurgeExpiredAuditsJob. Nightly scheduled version runs the same job. --cutoff overrides the retention-policy-derived cutoff (super_admin only; must specify --reason for the override audit trail).
commands.notes: Rate-limited to 3 invocations per hour per operator. Writes an audit row for the purge action itself (auditing the audit purge — meta-audit trail).

commands.purpose: Creates an AuditRetentionPolicy override for a tenant. Enterprise-only (audit_retention_extended entitlement). retention_years capped at config.audit.retention.max_years (10). --ends-at optional; when omitted, override is indefinite. --force lets super_admin bypass the entitlement check (writes an override audit row).
commands.notes: Rate-limited to 10 uses per hour per operator. Common triggers: regulator hold ('SEC investigation'), lawsuit hold ('discovery pending'), HIPAA compliance ('PHI record — 10y required').

commands.purpose: Async export request. Same behavior as POST /api/v1/audits/export. --kind: dsar | regulator | legal_hold. --filters accepts a JSON blob or references a saved filter (settings:audit.saved_filters).
commands.notes: Rate-limited to 20 exports per day per tenant. Fires AuditExportRequested event; the async job writes the jsonl.gz file to S3 + generates a signed URL. Requester receives AuditExportReadyNotification on completion.
